description_long: This is a large, modular wooden entertainment cabinet system featuring three main sections: a tall glass-fronted display cabinet on the left, a central TV stand with drawers, and a shorter cabinet with glass doors on the right. Above the TV stand, a floating wooden shelf is mounted, holding three decorative vases or bowls. The glass panels on the doors of the left and right cabinets allow for partial visibility of the interior, while the central section is designed to accommodate a flat-screen television. The wood has a rich, reddish-brown finish, and the handles on the doors and drawers are metallic, providing a modern touch. The back and sides are solid wood, and the overall structure is robust and designed for living room or lounge use. This unit is suitable for organizing electronics, displaying decorative items, and storing household goods.
description: A large, modular wooden entertainment cabinet with glass doors, a central TV stand, and an overhead shelf holding decorative vases. The unit features a rich wood finish and metallic handles, suitable for living room storage and display.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three main sections, glass doors, central TV, drawers, and the overhead shelf with vases.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the cabinets and the protruding shelf, with vases visible on top.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid wood backs of the cabinets and the TV stand, with no glass or handles visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the thickness of the unit and the alignment of the different sections.
